description: Analyze San Francisco residential building data to determine the price premium of new construction (year_built >= 2000) versus existing units (year_built < 2000) across different zones. Using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/new_construction_premium.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, calculate the median price per unit for each vintage by zone. The analysis should filter for valid residential units with sales prices and include only statistically relevant zones (minimum 20 new units and 50 existing units). Export a table containing zone_id, unit counts, median prices, and the price premium ratio to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_premium_analysis.csv. Additionally, produce a scatter plot of median prices to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/premium_scatter.png and a bar chart of the top 10 zones with the highest premium ratios to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_premium_zones.png. All notebook cells must be executed with outputs visible.
